special_mechanics.name: Whip Swinging
special_mechanics.description: Bull-whip can be used as method of swinging across pits in addition to being main attack method

special_mechanics.name: Alternate Locomotion Segments
special_mechanics.description: Game breaks from typical platforming with flying plane sections, mine cart riding, and raft sections down mountains

special_mechanics.name: Checkpoint System
special_mechanics.description: If Indy dies in an area, player restarts from beginning of current area or at last checkpoint

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Qualitative assessment based on published reviews and gameplay documentation. No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. Game uses same engine as Super Star Wars series but movement mechanics not explicitly detailed. Reviews describe it as 'extremely challenging' and 'brutally hard' with 'frequent unavoidable hits' noted by some reviewers.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Indiana Jones' Greatest Adventures
